name: tila-cli
description: tila CLI — durable state & coordination for multi-machine agentic work
author: Dawid Leszczyński (https://github.com/davebream)

scripts.compile: bun run gen:version && bun run compile:linux-x64 && bun run compile:linux-arm64 && bun run compile:linux-x64-musl && bun run compile:linux-arm64-musl && bun run compile:darwin-arm64 && bun run compile:darwin-x64 && bun run compile:windows-x64 && bun run compile:windows-arm64
scripts.compile:linux-x64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-linux-x64
scripts.compile:linux-arm64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-linux-arm64
scripts.compile:linux-x64-musl: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-x64-musl src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-linux-x64-musl
scripts.compile:linux-arm64-musl: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-arm64-musl src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-linux-arm64-musl
scripts.compile:darwin-arm64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-darwin-arm64
scripts.compile:darwin-x64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-darwin-x64
scripts.compile:windows-x64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-windows-x64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-windows-x64.exe
scripts.compile:windows-arm64: bun run build:worker-sidecar && bun build --compile --target bun-windows-arm64 src/index.ts --outfile dist/binaries/tila-windows-arm64.exe
